prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年山东省综合类最低位次分别为约15869名→15474名→65100名（断档）→8257名→6173名。2023年因电信学部断档位次骤降至65100名，2024年迅速回升至8257名，2025年进一步前移至6173名，近两年呈持续前移趋势，2025年基准位次约6173名；该校在山东省综合类招生计划：2021年246人→2022年203人→2023年203人→2024年173人→2025年164人，呈逐年递减趋势。2026年计划仅101人，较2025年164人大幅缩减约38.4%，缩招幅度显著，将加剧竞争，推动最低录取位次前移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 大连理工大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2021年第28位→2022年第31位→2023年第32位→2024年第28位→2025年第28位→2026年第28位，近年稳定在全国前30名，属于顶尖工科院校；2026年高考周期声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及2023年电信学部断档事件，但该事件已通过2024–2025年位次大幅回升得到消化；抖音热度排名第55位，评价为较热，短视频平台曝光度中等偏上；2024年投档异常信号为低关注，整体声誉对报考的负面影响有限；第五轮学科评估中，化学工程与技术获评A+，力学、机械工程、土木工程、工商管理、管理科学与工程、软件工程获评A，控制科学与工程、环境科学与工程获评A-，共10个学科达A-及以上水平，工科实力突出，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等大工优势专业方向在2024–2026年专业热度分析中持续被评为高热推荐或推荐，社会关注度高；山东省2026年普通高考考生约72万人，较2025年68.1万人增加约5.7%，考生规模扩大加剧整体竞争；省控线（普通类一段）2021–2025年分别为444分→437分→443分→444分→441分，整体平稳。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次6173名、2026年招生计划大幅缩招38.4%、山东省考生增加5.7%以及学校层次稳定、声誉影响有限等因素，缩招是推动位次前移的最关键因素。预测2026年最低录取位次约4600名，区间4100–5100名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 人工智能（新工科大师班）
- 电子信息类（创新班）
- 软件工程（创新班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 智能制造工程（创新班）
- 大数据管理与应用（新工科拔尖班）
- 飞行器设计与工程（创新班）
- 数学类（华罗庚数学国家基础学科拔尖计划班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）

- 储能科学与工程（新工科拔尖班）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 2026年大连理工大学在山东省综合类大幅缩招至101人，竞争显著加剧，预测位次区间4100–5100名。位次在4100名以内可重点冲刺一档王牌专业（人工智能大师班、电子信息类创新班）；位次在4600名左右建议以二档专业为主（智能制造、大数据、数学类）；位次在5100名附近可考虑三档专业保底。人工智能未来卓越班招生66人，名额充裕，可作为稳妥选择。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Shandong comprehensive category were approximately 15869 → 15474 → 65100 (discontinuity) → 8257 → 6173. In 2023, due to a discontinuity in the School of Electronic Information and Electrical Engineering, the ranking plummeted to 65100, but quickly recovered to 8257 in 2024 and further advanced to 6173 in 2025, showing a continuous upward trend in recent two years, with a baseline ranking of about 6173 in 2025. The enrollment plan for this university in Shandong comprehensive category: 2021: 246 → 2022: 203 → 2023: 203 → 2024: 173 → 2025: 164, showing a decreasing trend year by year. The 2026 plan is only 101, a significant reduction of about 38.4% compared to 164 in 2025, which will intensify competition and push the minimum admission ranking upward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Dalian University of Technology is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. Its Soft Science Chinese University Rankings: 2021: 28th → 2022: 31st → 2023: 32nd → 2024: 28th → 2025: 28th → 2026: 28th, stable among the top 30 in recent years, belonging to top engineering institutions. The reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is slightly negative, mainly involving the 2023 discontinuity event in the School of Electronic Information and Electrical Engineering, but this event has been digested by the significant ranking recovery in 2024–2025. Douyin popularity ranking: 55th, rated as relatively hot, with medium to high exposure on short video platforms. The 2024 abnormal admission signal is low attention, and the overall reputation has limited negative impact on applications. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Chemical Engineering and Technology received A+, Mechanics, Mechanical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Business Administration, Management Science and Engineering, and Software Engineering received A, Control Science and Engineering, and Environmental Science and Engineering received A-, with a total of 10 disciplines reaching A- or above, highlighting strong engineering strength and strong appeal to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer science, electronic information/communication, electrical engineering and other advantageous majors of DUT have been consistently rated as high-heat recommended or recommended in the 2024–2026 major popularity analysis, with high social attention. In 2026, the number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in Shandong Province is about 720,000, an increase of about 5.7% from 685,000 in 2025, intensifying overall competition. The provincial control line (ordinary class first segment) from 2021 to 2025 is 444 → 437 → 443 → 444 → 441, overall stable.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 6173, the significant enrollment reduction of 38.4% in 2026, the 5.7% increase in Shandong candidates, the stable university level, and limited reputation impact, the enrollment reduction is the most critical factor driving the ranking upward. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will be about 4600, with a range of 4100–5100.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Artificial Intelligence (New Engineering Master Class)
- Electronic Information (Innovation Class)
- Software Engineering (Innovation Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Intelligent Manufacturing Engineering (Innovation Class)
- Big Data Management and Application (New Engineering Top-Notch Class)
- Aircraft Design and Engineering (Innovation Class)
- Mathematics (Hua Luogeng National Basic Discipline Top-Notch Plan Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Artificial Intelligence (Future Excellence Class)
- Energy Storage Science and Engineering (New Engineering Top-Notch Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, Dalian University of Technology significantly reduced its comprehensive enrollment in Shandong to 101, intensifying competition, with a predicted ranking range of 4100–5100. Candidates with rankings within 4100 can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Artificial Intelligence Master Class, Electronic Information Innovation Class); those around 4600 are advised to mainly consider Tier 2 majors (Intelligent Manufacturing, Big Data, Mathematics); those near 5100 can consider Tier 3 majors as a safety choice. The Artificial Intelligence Future Excellence Class enrolls 66 students, with ample slots, making it a stable option.
